zh.lifeSummary: 當Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal於大約1112年出生在烏克蘭Київ時，她的父親Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis20歲，母親Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans22歲。她於大約1150年與Yaroslav Osmomysl在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир素茲達利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1182年7月14日在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьРусино享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal于大约1112年出生在乌克兰Київ时，她的父亲Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis20岁，母亲Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans22岁。她于大约1150年与Yaroslav Osmomysl在俄罗斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир素茲達利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1182年7月14日在俄罗斯Владимирская ОбластьРусино享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Olga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Scandinavian origin, originally derived from the Old Norse adjective heilagr ‘prosperous, successful’. It was imported by the Scandinavian settlers who founded the first Russian state in the 9th century. St Olga of Kiev ( d. 969 ) was a Varangian noblewoman who was baptized at Byzantium in about 957 and set about converting her people. The name was introduced to the English-speaking world in the late 19th century, but retains a distinctively Russian flavour.

en.lifeSummary: When Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal was born about 1112, in Kyiv, Ukraine, her father, Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis, was 20 and her mother, Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans, was 22. She married Yaroslav Osmomysl about 1150, in Suzdal', Vladimir, Vladimir Oblast, Russia. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 14 July 1182, in rusino, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal est née environ 1112, à Kyiv, Ukraine, son père, Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Yaroslav Osmomysl environ 1150, à Suzdal', Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1182, à rusino, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal um 1112 in Kyiv, Ukraine geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis 20 und ihre Mutter Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans 22. Sie hat um 1150 in Suzdal', Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russland Yaroslav Osmomysl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1182 im Alter von 71 Jahren in rusino, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal è nata il circa 1112 nel Kyiv, Ucraina, sua padre, Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Yaroslav Osmomysl circa 1150, nel Suzdal', Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1182, nel rusino, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdalが約1112年にウクライナКиївで生まれた時，父Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukisは20歳，母Anna Aëpovna of the Cumansは22歳であった。約1150年にロシアВладимирская ОбластьВладимирスズダル'でYaroslav Osmomyslと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1182年7月14日にロシアВладимирская ОбластьРусиноで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal(이)가 대략 1112년 우크라이나 Київ에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1150년 러시아 Владимирская Область Владимир 수즈다'에서 Yaroslav Osmomysl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1182년 7월 14일 러시아 Владимирская Область Русино에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal nasceu aproximadamente 1112, em Kyiv, Ucrânia, seu pai, Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Yaroslav Osmomysl aproximadamente 1150, em Suzdal', Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rússia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de julho de 1182, em rusino, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rússia, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal родилась около 1112 г. в местности Киев, Украина, её отцу по имени Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Yaroslav Osmomysl около 1150 г. в местности суздал', Владимир, Владимирская Область, Россия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 14 июля 1182 г. в местности Русино, Владимирская Область, Россия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olga Euphrosyne Jurivna von Susdal nació aproximadamente 1112, en Kyiv, Ucrania, su papá, Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Yaroslav Osmomysl aproximadamente 1150, en Suzdal', Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rusia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1182, en rusino, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rusia, a la edad de 71 años.
